calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-17-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Appellant, Defendant Bay Area Lightworks Inc. Mylon Tam the moving party.
Respondent, Plaintiff Pamela Lyau the opposing party.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Appellant, Defendant Bay Area Lightworks Inc. Mylon Tam testifies on his behalf.

Respondent, Plaintiff Pamela Lyau testifies on her own behalf.

At the conclusion of the case, the matter is taken under submission.
Judge Pro Tem Henry Shain, Clerk A. Datt, Not Recorded. (525)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-02-2020 Continued To Sep-17-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-20-2020 Judgment Entered
